subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from God, the Lord of the worlds, and maketh mention of him who turned toward the Countenance when every heedless one turned away therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله رب العالمین و یذکر فیه من اقبل الی الوجه اذ اعرض عنه کل جاهل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
